title: Martin Shkreli Believes Trying to Stop AI is POINTLESS?
summary: Martin Shkreli discusses his views on artificial intelligence and the effective acceleration movement, expressing belief that stopping AI advancement is futile and that humans are not fundamentally unique from a biological perspective.

key_claims.claim: Trying to stop AI development is completely futile
Humans are not fundamentally unique from a biological perspective - we are essentially operating systems made of strings in biological databases
Humans will eventually be viewed by AI similarly to how we view zoo animals
